summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Phishing Eval dashboard - all core functionalities working correctly
passed_tests: Health check endpoint returns mongo: true and bigquery: true
Auth endpoint /api/auth/me returns user data with valid session token
Eval jobs endpoint returns 24 seeded jobs with proper structure
Eval verdict endpoint accepts and saves verdicts successfully
Prod verdict endpoint saves verdicts to MongoDB
Eval config endpoint saves configuration successfully
Production jobs endpoint returns BigQuery results with pagination
Login page renders with Google sign-in button
Dashboard renders with jobs table and stats after authentication
Mode toggle between Production and Eval works seamlessly
Analytics panel toggles on button click
Job row expansion shows detailed panel with phishing classification data
Verdict dropdowns are interactive with 4 options (blank, correct, incorrect, disputed)
CSV export and refresh buttons are functional and clickable
User authentication via session cookie works properly
BigQuery integration fetches production phishing data successfully
